title: Over 80% women lawyers say their careers are harder than those of male lawyers: SCBA survey
description: 4 out of 5 women lawyers in India say that their professional journey has been harder than that of their male counterparts, according to a nationwide survey conducted by the Supreme Court Bar Association (SCBA).Titled Documenting Voices of Women Legal Professionals in India, the study analysed responses from 2,604 women lawyers across 23 State Bar Councils, examining issues ranging from professional opportunity and workplace bias to harassment, infrastructure and family responsibilities.The surv
